purpose: Guardrail for pipeline architecture work so new systems are not considered complete until they are wired into the orchestrator.
requirements: Every new pipeline subsystem must define whether it is a new orchestrator stage, part of an existing stage, or both.
Every new stage must appear in orchestrator stage dispatch, usage text, and supported-stage validation.
Every new stage must define at least one readiness/output contract that guided mode can check.
If a stage depends on upstream files, guided mode must run it after those dependencies and invalidate stale downstream outputs when inputs change.
If a stage changes workspace structure, ensureWorkspaceLayout must seed the required files or folders.
Every reusable pipeline addition must document its orchestrator wiring in docs/technical_docs/CHANGELOG.md.
Every reusable pipeline addition should have at least one test-story or audit command when practical.
